title: Cold Logic Checking Mechanism Schema
description: Schema for cold logic scripts that can sit idle as checking mechanisms, checking down the chain for problems and recommending adjustments to SMPbots

id.description: Unique identifier for the cold logic checker

description.description: Description of what this cold logic checks

ColdLogicState.description: State management for cold logic (can sit idle)

status.description: Current status of the cold logic checker

lastCheckDuration.description: Duration of last check in milliseconds

TriggerConfig.description: Configuration for when cold logic triggers

interval.description: Interval between checks in seconds (for periodic mode)

events.description: Events that trigger this checker (for event_driven mode)

conditions.description: Conditions that must be met for triggering

CheckChain.description: Chain of checks to perform - cold logic checks down the chain

links.description: Ordered list of checks in the chain

executionMode.description: How to execute the chain links

stopOnFailure.description: Stop chain execution on first failure

ChainLink.description: Individual link in the check chain

dependencies.description: IDs of links that must complete first

timeout.description: Timeout for this link in milliseconds

target.description: Target to check (metric name, state field, etc.)

windowSize.description: Time window for aggregation in seconds

adjustmentTypes.description: Types of adjustments this checker can recommend

cooldownPeriod.description: Minimum time between adjustments in seconds

CheckerScript.description: Script definition for the cold logic checker

AdjustmentRecommendation.description: Recommendation for adjustment to help SMPbot fully embody function

examples.name: Performance Drift Checker
examples.description: Monitors SMPbot performance and detects drift patterns

examples.name: Model Quality Gate
examples.description: Checks model output quality and recommends adjustments to fully embody function
